name: disaster_response_heat_dome_stresses_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A Disaster Response response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving disaster response heat dome stresses millhaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Gideon Kaur
agents.identity: I am Gideon Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Disaster Response when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Sana Kaur
agents.identity: I am Sana Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Disaster Response.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Gideon Kaur must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Gideon Kaur do?
